---
title: 'Funky'
date: '2015-02-23T01:45:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '720717202949126553'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/funky.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

This has been a weird day. I've been feeling... funky. Disoriented. Grumpy. Now it's the end of the day and the boys on are on the floor with Mommy rolling the ball back and forth. I'm thinking I should have played with them like Connor kept asking me today. Someday he's going to be older, and he may not ask anymore. But I just couldn't bring myself to it.<br />
<br />
Maybe I should have gotten up and played with them, but I was afraid I'd yell or something. <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
